name: games
description: Static Queens clone with regression tests

scripts.sync:storybook:site: npm run build-storybook && rm -rf _site/stories && mkdir -p _site/stories && cp -R storybook-static/. _site/stories/
scripts.build:site:base: rm -rf _site && mkdir -p _site _site/generic _site/games _site/stories _site/king-max _site/nonogram && cp index.html _site/index.html && cp styles.css _site/styles.css && cp social-preview.svg social-preview.png _site/ && cp -R generic/. _site/generic/ && cp -R games/. _site/games/ && cp king-max/index.html _site/king-max/index.html && cp social-preview.svg social-preview.png _site/king-max/ && cp nonogram/index.html _site/nonogram/index.html && touch _site/.nojekyll
scripts.build:site: npm run build:site:base && npm run build-storybook && cp -R storybook-static/. _site/stories/
scripts.dev:stories:site: npm run build:site:base && npm run watch:storybook:site
scripts.test:games: npm run test:king-max && npm run test:nonogram
